metadata.name: Run Final Conflicts Check Before Filing

description: Just before filing a new lawsuit, a partner asks for a final conflicts check to be run, including newly added defendants.

nodes.task_description: Get the final list of all plaintiffs and defendants.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the complete list of parties.

nodes.task_description: Run each name through the firm's conflicts database.
Generate a report confirming that no new conflicts have been identified.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the final clearance to file the lawsuit.
